field_notes.server_id: Smallest String accepted by the official readUtf(20)/writeUtf codec.
field_notes.public_key_hex: Smallest byte array accepted by the official STREAM_CODEC without calling getPublicKey().
field_notes.challenge_hex: Smallest byte array accepted by the official STREAM_CODEC without initialized login crypto state.
field_notes.should_authenticate: False fixture accepted by the official ClientboundHelloPacket constructor and STREAM_CODEC.

stop_boundary: Proves Login clientbound hello packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty serverId/publicKey/challenge and shouldAuthenticate=false fixture only; do not infer encryption success, authentication success, key validation, login state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
